mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (title, description, discount_value, stock, category, image_url, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{discountValue}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
